This is the culminating milestone for Serenity's prior RKLB thesis: the trajectory from ~$16 thesis entry through institutional accumulation to Nasdaq 100 inclusion is the exact pattern she now applies as a template when analyzing $NBIS and $SIVE (institutions with <30% ownership → float absorption → ATH → large-cap index status).
